summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Distinta Materiali (BOM) module - Backend APIs, Frontend UI, and Integration all working properly

minor_bugs.issue: Requires valid client_id for creation, which is expected behavior

passed_tests: POST /api/distinte/ - Creates distinta with auto-calculated totals
PUT /api/distinte/{id} - Updates distinta and recalculates totals
Distinta editor page loads and functions
New distinta creation with save functionality
Material items table with Add Row functionality
